untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic range width measurement and multi-leg targeting (1.25x and 1.5x range width as price targets). The allowed indicator set does not include a 'congestion_range_width' or 'intrabar_penetration_detection' indicator. Donchian channels approximate range boundaries, but calculating target distances as multiples of prior consolidation width requires custom range detection logic not available in the standard indicator library. Volume-based breakout confirmation is approximated using vol_ratio_20.
translation_notes: Approximation: Used Donchian channels (dc_upper, dc_lower) as proxy for range boundaries and volume ratio for breakout confirmation. The core Schwager principle of measuring consolidation width and projecting 1.25x/1.5x targets requires custom range measurement not expressible in this constraint set. Recommend implementing custom 'congestion_width' indicator or post-processing logic to calculate target levels from prior consolidation highs/lows.
